nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Balsas screech owl
nodes.summary: Balsas screech owl（Balsas screech owl，学名 Megascops seductus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于次生林，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits arid open and semi-open areas such as deciduous woodland with cactus, thorn forest, and secondary forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It can also be found in tropical scrublands and the edges of cultivated areas

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However, its population is unknown and is suspected to be in decline due to habitat loss and degradation
